title: Paradoxia
description: This modpack contains mods for WorldGen, Tools, Machines, Cars, and more.
body:
## About
This project was created expressly for the use on the Valley and Ridge Games Network, with mods that overhaul gameplay, worldgen, structures, tools, and more. Its use is open to the public in compliance with individual mod licenses. Please give these mods a look and support their creators!

## Mod List (excl. libraries)

### Quality of Life
- Appleskin
- Blur
- CleanCut
- InventoryProfilesNext
- JEI & Various Addons

### Technology
- Applied Energistics 2
- Automobility
- CC: Restitched
- Create Additions
- Megacells

### Tools
- Forgero
- GrappleMod
- HWG
- Iron Jetpacks
- Travelers Backpack

### Gameplay
- Croptopia
- Numismatic Overhaul
- RealisticSleep

### Look and Feel
- Falling Leaves
- Immersive Weathering
- Iris Shaders
- LambDynamicLights

### WorldGen & AI Changes
- Guard Villagers
- SmarterFarmers
- Takes a Pillage
- Terralith
- Towns and Towers

## Disclaimer
If you are a mod author and feel that you have not been properly credited, please contact me to correct the issue. Thanks!
